message:
Didn't realize the Atlantic hurricane season already kicked off this month until I saw this from the Red Cross — and one line stuck with me: it's not just a coastal thing. Storms can knock out power for people hundreds of miles inland too.

It nudged me to finally look at what we actually keep at home — we're good on water and batteries, but I always forget a backup way to charge our phones.

What's the one thing you make sure you've got, just in case? 👇
